name: Struffoli (Honey Balls)
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk together the eggs, butter, and 1 teaspoon sugar until foamy.
2. Add baking powder; gradually add flour. Work the mixture into a soft dough with your hands.
3. Divide the dough into 4 pieces. On a floured surface, roll each piece into a rope about the width of your index finger and 12 inches long.
4. Cut the ropes into 1-inch pieces. Toss the pieces with enough flour to dust them lightly and shake off excess flour.
5. Heat oil to 375°F in a deep fryer.
6. Fry the struffoli a few handfuls at a time until they puff up and are golden brown. Using a slotted spoon, transfer to a paper towel to drain.
7. Combine the honey and half cup sugar in a large saucepan over low heat; stirring until the sugar has dissolved; keep warm over low heat.
8. Add the fried balls, a few at a time, and turn them with a wooden spoon to coat on all sides. Transfer the balls to a large platter and mound them into a pyramid, shaping with wet hands.
9. Sprinkle with the colored sprinkles and let stand for 1 to 2 hours. Then break off some pieces with your hands to eat.
